fields.label: Secret Key
fields.description: Scaleway IAM API key Secret Key (the X-Auth-Token value, an opaque hyphenated string — NOT the Access Key).

fields.label: Project ID
fields.description: Scaleway Project UUID every resource is scoped to. The default project's id equals the Organization ID; non-default projects differ.

fields.label: Organization ID
fields.description: Optional. Used to filter GET /account/v3/projects and to label the authenticate result.

fields.label: Zone
fields.description: Scaleway is multi-zone; Atlas is single-region per vendor. Pick one Elastic Metal zone: fr-par-1, fr-par-2, nl-ams-1, nl-ams-2, pl-waw-2, pl-waw-3 (NOT pl-waw-1).

fields.label: Billing
fields.description: hourly has no upfront fee; monthly is cheaper to run but charges a one-time commitment fee (non-refundable for new subscriptions). Hourly and monthly are distinct offer IDs — discover() filters offers to this mode.

fields.label: SSH Key ID
fields.description: Scaleway's IAM SSH key id, installed on each new Elastic Metal server. Left blank, the provider registers Atlas Settings.ssh_public_key with IAM at provision time; cache the returned id here to reuse it. Vendor-specific — meaningless to other providers.
